what_it_does: Records a channel attachment metadata entry that points to an image asset (image://design-source/capital-raise/p-20) under the design-source channel, with an attachment type of images and an added timestamp.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
It declares an attachment id att-bee659c1 in the design-source channel.
attachment_type is 'images' and the target uses an image:// URI scheme pointing to design-source/capital-raise/p-20.
No code symbols, prose, or additional metadata fields are present.
standouts: Uses a custom image:// URI to reference an external image asset.
Attachment record is channel-scoped and typed (images).
File name matches the declared id (att-bee659c1).
conventions: Follows a YAML frontmatter metadata convention for ledger attachments.
Uses a stable identifier as both the file name and the id field.
References assets via a URI scheme rather than a filesystem path.
concerns: The target image:// URI is not resolvable from this file alone; no scheme definition or base location is provided.
No title, caption, or alt text is recorded for the image attachment.
No author or provenance information is captured beyond an added timestamp.
notes: This is a lightweight channel attachment index card that links a single image asset to the design-source channel.
questions: What does the image:// URI scheme resolve to in storage?
Is p-20 a page, slide, or specific image identifier within the capital-raise set?
Are there other attachment types or channels that reference the same target?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to serve as an attachment ledger entry for an image, and its content matches that purpose; it records the link but provides no descriptive context.
intention_signals: It seems intended to catalog image attachments in a channel-based memory system so that design-source content can reference visual assets by stable identifiers rather than direct paths.
contribution: Provides a stable, typed pointer from the design-source channel to a specific image asset, enabling a fused system to locate and associate visual material with channel context.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment record named att-bee659c1 in the design-source channel that references the image asset image://design-source/capital-raise/p-20 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and link an image asset to the design-source channel for later retrieval and association.
